caption: A man stands behind a microphone in a room with vertical wood paneling and slatted blinds. He wears glasses, a white shirt, and a dark vest with traditional embroidery. In front of him, several women are seated with their backs to the camera; they have varying hair colors, including blonde and brown, and wear dark-colored clothing. A dark drum sits on a stand behind the man. The text "ORCA" appears in a white box on the right side of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks into the microphone, shifting his head slightly and blinking. He remains standing in the same position, while the seated audience remains still. The lighting and camera angle remain constant throughout the scene.
